THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEINTRAUB, ELIAS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 672A MISSOURI, STAYED UNTIL DEC-10-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, 5:00 PM. PLTF TO KEEP SECURITY DEPOSIT. IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE ON TIME, PLTF MAY AMEND JDMT FOR BACK RENT & DAMAGES, ATTY FEES & COSTS. IF DEFT DAMAGES PROPERTY, PLTF MAY AMEND JDMT TO RECOVER REPAIR COSTS.
